scripts.build: npm run build -w @faka/demo-director-recorder && npm run build -w @faka/demo-director-app-sdk && npm run build -w @faka/demo-director
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @faka/demo-director-recorder && npm run typecheck -w @faka/demo-director-app-sdk && npm run typecheck -w @faka/demo-director
